text.title: AI Agent Patterns Worked Examples
text.summary: Three worked examples: CoT (reasoning only), ReAct (tool-driven research), Plan-and-Execute (multi-step build).

example.code: {"task_id":"reasoning-001", "classification":{"needs_tools":false,"step_count":1,"branching":false}, "chosen_pattern":"cot","chosen_framework":"raw-sdk","framework_pin":"anthropic==0.39.0", "caps":{"max_steps":1,"loop_detect":false}, "tools":[], "rationale":"Pure reasoning over prompt content; no tools needed; CoT on raw SDK is smallest.", "rejected":[{"pattern":"react","framework":"raw-sdk","reason":"no tools so react would degenerate"}]}

{"task_id":"research-002", "classification":{"needs_tools":true,"step_count":4,"branching":false}, "chosen_pattern":"react","chosen_framework":"raw-sdk","framework_pin":"anthropic==0.39.0", "caps":{"max_steps":15,"loop_detect":true}, "tools":[{"name":"web_search","description":"Full-text web search via SearXNG, returns top 10 results","schema_ref":"schemas/web_search.json"}], "rationale":"Needs tools (web_search) and step count small (4) with no branching — ReAct on raw SDK is the smallest fit.", "rejected":[{"pattern":"plan-and-execute","framework":"langgraph","reason":"step count too small for a graph"}]}

{"task_id":"build-003", "classification":{"needs_tools":true,"step_count":8,"branching":true}, "chosen_pattern":"plan-and-execute","chosen_framework":"langgraph","framework_pin":"langgraph==0.2.34", "caps":{"max_steps":15,"loop_detect":true}, "tools":[{"name":"read_file","description":"Read a file in the repo","schema_ref":"schemas/read_file.json"}, {"name":"edit_file","description":"Edit a file with old_str/new_str diff","schema_ref":"schemas/edit_file.json"}, {"name":"run_pytest","description":"Run pytest on a path; return JUnit XML","schema_ref":"schemas/run_pytest.json"}], "rationale":"Needs tools, step_count > 5 (8 steps), branching present (different paths per test failure) — Plan-and-Execute on LangGraph fits.", "rejected":[{"pattern":"react","framework":"raw-sdk","reason":"step count too high; ReAct gets stuck without a plan"}]}
